name: activate
typeref: typename:gboolean (*)(GPasteUiHistoryAction * self,GPasteClient * client,GPasteSettings * settings,GtkWindow * rootwin,const gchar * history)

name: bash-completion
pattern: /^option('bash-completion', type: 'boolean', value: true, description: 'install bash completion fi/

name: dbus-services-dir
pattern: /^option('dbus-services-dir', type: 'string', value: '', description: 'path to the dbus services d/

name: gnome-shell
pattern: /^option('gnome-shell', type: 'boolean', value: true, description: 'install the gnome-shell extens/

name: introspection
pattern: /^option('introspection', type: 'boolean', value: true, description: 'build GIR data')$/

name: read_history_file
typeref: typename:void (*)(const GPasteStorageBackend * self,const gchar * history_file_path,GList ** history,gsize * size)

name: systemd
pattern: /^option('systemd', type: 'boolean', value: true, description: 'install the systemd unit')$/

name: systemd-user-unit-dir
pattern: /^option('systemd-user-unit-dir', type: 'string', value: '', description: 'path to where systemd s/

name: vapi
pattern: /^option('vapi', type: 'boolean', value: true, description: 'build vala bindings')$/

name: write_history_file
typeref: typename:void (*)(const GPasteStorageBackend * self,const gchar * history_file_path,const GList * history)

name: x-keybinder
pattern: /^option('x-keybinder', type: 'boolean', value: true, description: 'build the x keybinder')$/

name: zsh-completion
pattern: /^option('zsh-completion', type: 'boolean', value: true, description: 'install zsh completion file/
